---
title: "Homework6"
author: "Kunaal Raghav"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Install Packages

```{r}
#install.packages("bootstrap")
library(bootstrap)
```

## Question 1: Bases and Sopranos

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

Part B

```{r}

#Data creation
x <- c(102,115,127,127,162,180,184,205,239,240)


theta_hat <- min(x)

#LOOCV Calculation
theta_i <- sapply(1:length(x), function(i) min(x[-i]))

#Equation
theta_jack <- length(x) * mean(theta_i) - (length(x) - 1) * theta_hat

#Results
theta_jack

```

Note for the equation ( which is theta-hat) the equation is as follows:

$$
\hat{\theta}jack= n\hat{\theta}-(n-1)\bar{\theta}_{(-)}
$$

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
